Log \#7  
Prompt: Take this application and make the following changes: for each reel of the slot machine, add an emoji/visual icon that corresponds with the word. Also, clearly define what trading tokens for slides does in the slow machine under the mechanics section.

Observations:   
**🧠 Game Logic**

* **No core logic changes**  
  * Mechanics (bonus, setbacks, resets) stay the same

---

## **🎨 Theme / Visuals**

* **Icons added to all symbols**  
  * Now actual emojis instead of placeholders  
* Makes reels feel more polished \+ readable

---

## **🧱 UI / Layout**

* **New “Mechanics” panel added**  
  * Explains cashout behavior clearly  
* Better onboarding / clarity for players

---

## **✍️ Content / Clarity**

* Improved explanation of:  
  * Cashout tradeoff (lose tokens, reset streak, possible refill)  
* Overall UI copy slightly clearer and more explicit

---

## **⚡ Net Effect**

* **No gameplay change**  
* Better **clarity \+ polish**  
* Feels more complete and understandable

Validation:   
No HTML errors  
No CSS errors

Changes:   
Center the icons in the reels. Right now they are aligned right. 

Visual:   
![][image1]

Improvements: 

* Center reel contents (make sure it’s compatible with different screen sizes)  
* Change some layouts such that not all segments of the slot machine are set into in a box.   
* Add Audio Based elements to the game based off of the current theme in use. 

New Prompt Brainstorming:   
Take this application and make the following changes: ensure that the reel contents (text and image) are centered and make sure it is consistent across different screens (small laptop, tablet, etc.). Change some layouts such that not all segments of the slot machine are set into a box. Add audio-based elements to the game based on the current theme in use.
